meta.title: Website Packages | Honorary Consulate of Hungary — New England
meta.description: Three transparent web design packages built for consular offices, immigration practices, and professional services. Starter, Pro, and Premium — each scoped to deliver real results.

hero.headline: Built for Practices That Cannot Afford a Bad Website
hero.subheadline: Every tier delivers a production-ready website. The difference is which growth levers you activate.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.tagline: Everything you need to be found and trusted.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.tagline: The full acquisition engine — book clients in their sleep.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.tagline: Revenue beyond services — merchandise, digital products, and recurring income.

comparison.heading: What You Get at Each Tier

items.q: How long does a build take?
items.a: Starter in 2–3 weeks. Pro in 4–6 weeks. Premium in 6–10 weeks. Timeline depends on how quickly you provide content and feedback.

items.q: What do I need to provide?
items.a: Logo, headshot or professional photo, service descriptions, and any existing copy. We guide you through a structured intake form at the start of every project.

items.q: Is the booking system really automated?
items.a: Yes. The Pro tier includes a Cal.com integration pre-configured for Monday-only appointment slots. Clients book themselves — no back-and-forth email needed.

items.q: What is the Hungarian language toggle?
items.a: Every page is built bilingual from day one. A toggle in the nav switches between English and Hungarian instantly. All content — headings, body, CTAs, labels — is translated.
Yes. All sites deploy to Vercel. Your domain is connected on launch day. Hosting costs are yours (~$0–20/month depending on traffic).
Yes — Starter and Pro tiers are built on the same codebase architecture. Upgrading adds features on top without rebuilding. We will quote the delta, not the full price.

cta.headline: Let's Build It
cta.body: Not sure which tier is right? Send a message and describe your situation. We will tell you honestly which package fits — and what to skip.
